title: Kidambi Srikanth Falters in US Open Final
indian_angle: Indian fans will be keen to know about Kidambi Srikanth's performance in a major final.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth fought hard but ultimately lost to Su Li-yang in the US Open Badminton final, settling for silver.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Shines at US Open
indian_angle: This story highlights the integrity and fair play of Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth during his recent tournament run.
summary: A look back at Kidambi Srikanth's admirable act of overturning a point given to him during his US Open final run, showcasing true sportsmanship.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a stunning performance by defeating a top-ranked player, marking a significant upset.
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo fan Rounak Chouhan created a stir at the US Open by beating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen in a remarkable match.

title: PV Sindhu's Stardom Journey Began in Macau
indian_angle: This feature explores the early career steps of India's badminton icon PV Sindhu, tracing her path to becoming a global star.
summary: A retrospective on how Macau, often known as a gambling capital, played a pivotal role in PV Sindhu's initial steps on her road to stardom.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games
indian_angle: The article details the Indian badminton squad for the upcoming Asian Games, featuring key players like Treesa and Gayatri.
summary: India's Thomas Cup winning squad members, including Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, are back together for the Asian Games, aiming for more glory.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game Compared to Saina, Sindhu
indian_angle: This piece analyzes the playing style of young Indian talent Tanvi Sharma in comparison to legendary Indian shuttlers.
summary: An analysis questions whether young shuttler Tanvi Sharma's game developing more like Saina Nehwal's than PV Sindhu's, sparking debate among fans.
